name: energy_research_licensing_backlog_forces_kestrel_st_lt
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Energy Research, the situation tagged internally around energy research licensing backlog forces kestrel st lt has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Elena Navarro
agents.identity: I am Elena Navarro, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Energy Research. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Kim
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Energy Research. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if short term advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for long term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Elena Navarro must choose under short term versus long term. What does Elena Navarro do?
